title: No subquery generation if tavily api fails
one_liner: Tavily fails on long (>400 char) queries and subquery generation returns an empty list instead of falling back to other configured retrievers; needs fallback logic across retrievers.

title: WebSocket is disconnected, how to retrieve it after the disconnection
one_liner: Long deep-research runs drop the websocket and the in-progress report is lost; requires backend persistence/reconnect architecture, a larger design decision.

title: Needed workaround for "Error: 429 Resource has been exhausted"
one_liner: Requested 429 retry-with-backoff in the LLM completion loop is already implemented in current llm.py (try/except + exponential backoff over max_attempts); close as resolved.

title: FEATURE REQUEST: Allow user selection of models at query time
one_liner: Let users pick FAST/SMART/STRATEGIC models per request (via headers) instead of only env vars; product-level direction decision tied to user-management work.

title: FEATURE REQUEST: Add user login and rights management
one_liner: Requests multi-user auth/LDAP/rights groups (OpenWebUI-style); large product decision, maintainer leans toward wrapping in OpenWebUI rather than building in-repo.

title: FEATURE REQUEST: Keep history / embedding to allow query and report rewriting
one_liner: Persist per-report embeddings/vector store so saved reports can be re-queried/rewritten; needs persistent vector-store support, a design decision.

title: FEATURE REQUEST: Schedule and queue research requests
one_liner: Add scheduling/queuing/throttling of research jobs for multi-user/self-hosted setups; backend job-queue architecture decision.

title: FEATURE REQUEST: Build Open-WebUI tool / integration
one_liner: Build an Open-WebUI tool/integration using the GPTR pip library; a trivial PR (#1241) exists but deep integration (shared knowledgebase embeddings) is undecided.

title: Graph RAG
one_liner: Add knowledge-graph / Neo4j vector-store support to extract entities/relationships during research; maintainer green-lit but needs a swappable vector-store provider design.

title: Reranker models
one_liner: Support dedicated reranker models (Cohere/AWS) for source curation with the current LLM-prompt ranking as fallback; needs a configurable reranker abstraction.

title: BUG: Pydantic error: Input should be a valid string
one_liner: Thinking models (ollama qwen3/deepseek) wrap query-generation output in <think> tags, breaking json_repair and yielding nested/empty sub_query lists; strip reasoning tags in the generic LLM provider response.

title: <think> text gets to the output when using deepseek models with ollama
one_liner: deepseek-r1 via ollama leaks <think>...</think> reasoning into the final report; strip think tags from LLM responses (same root cause as #1303).

title: Follow-up questions broken
one_liner: The NextJS 'ask questions about this report' chat freezes/redirects to homepage instead of running; chat agent wiring in websocket_manager + frontend needs fixing.

title: IndexError: list index out of range when running a research
one_liner: Detailed report on local docs with Gemini/DeepSeek crashes with IndexError in subtopic report generation; likely empty subtopics list, needs repro/logs but a guard in detailed_report is the likely fix.

title: Connection from NextJS Frontend to GPTR Backend
one_liner: Frontend connects to backend directly from the browser via NEXT_PUBLIC_GPTR_API_URL, forcing backend port exposure; proxying requests through the Next server would avoid exposing port 8000.

title: [Feature request] Download markdown and json logs in NextJS backend
one_liner: Markdown and JSON-log downloads work in the uvicorn frontend but are missing/broken in the NextJS frontend; add the markdown/json export buttons there.

title: [FEATURE REQUEST] Multiple OpenAI base URLs for local hosting
one_liner: Allow separate OpenAI base URLs per role (fast/smart/strategic/embedding) so e.g. OpenRouter + a local embedding endpoint can coexist; workaround is a LiteLLM proxy.

title: NextJS UI Issues
one_liner: Multiple NextJS UI console errors on load/preferences page behind a reverse proxy; mix of config (NEXT_PUBLIC_GPTR_API_URL) and possible missing build deps, needs clarification/repro.

title: Can't find local pdf documents when using pip package
one_liner: DOC_PATH local docs work via CLI but 'no documents found' through the pip package; likely missing optional parsing deps or report_source not set to local, needs DEBUG logs to confirm.

title: Deep Research - Context Trimming Failure
one_liner: trim_context_to_word_limit got nested lists of dicts instead of strings (introduced by PR #1195); count_words now coerces lists but deep_research still passes nested structures, so flatten all_context before trimming.

title: My Documents Mode pulls information from the internet
one_liner: In Documents-only mode the report includes external web sources/citations; need to verify report_source handling restricts retrieval to local docs, repro details requested.

title: No / Empty Report Generated
one_liner: Empty report when using Gemini + DuckDuckGo via Docker; maintainer asked for logs/outputs folder contents, blocked on reporter info.

title: Upload a document and have the LLM parse its format for custom formatting
one_liner: Feature request to upload a template document, have the model learn its format, and generate output matching that format/length; open-ended product decision.

title: How can i use local ollama instead of openAI api?
one_liner: User asks how to use local Ollama; answered in comments with the OLLAMA_BASE_URL/FAST_LLM/EMBEDDING env config, close pointing to the Ollama docs.

title: Better leverage large context length LLMs
one_liner: Make hard-coded content-truncation lengths configurable so 1M-token models (Gemini/GPT-4.1) can ingest more content; needs auditing truncation points and exposing config.

title: API Reference Docs
one_liner: User requests comprehensive API/config-reference docs (not just how-to guides); maintainer aware, needs decision on producing a reference section enumerating all config options.
